title: Discord Not Disadvantageous.
content:
Fortune no higher project can devise
    Than to sow discord 'mongst the enemies.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Discord Not Disadvantageous.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
